The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience or a strong background in working with Large Language Models (LLMs), fine-tuning techniques, and LangChain framework integration. Benefits

  • Paid Sick Leave
  • Paid Time Off
  • Provident Fund (PF)
  • Work From Home (as applicable)

Required Skills

1–2 years of relevant experience in AI/ML or Generative AI development. - Strong understanding of Python and Machine Learning frameworks (PyTorch/TensorFlow). - Familiarity with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere, etc.). - Hands-on experience with LangChain and/or LangGraph. - Experience building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines. - Experience integrating vector databases such as FAISS, Chroma, Weaviate, or Qdrant. - Good understanding of prompt engineering and model inference. - Exposure to training or fine-tuning transformer-based models.

Nice to Have

  • Experience with model quantization (GGUF/GGML), LoRA, PEFT, or QLoRA.
  • Experience with the Hugging Face ecosystem (Model Hub, Datasets).
  • Exposure to AWS, GCP, Kubernetes, or GPU clusters.
  • Familiarity with MLOps practices and model versioning.
